name: Bhindi Subji (Okra & Tomatoes)
recipeInstructions:
1. Wipe okra gently with a moist kitchen towel.
2. Cut each into 4 pieces and set aside.
3. Heat vegetable oil in a skillet.
4. Add onions, garlic, cumin seed, chilies (optional), and coriander leaves.
5. Saute for 4 to 5 minutes. Stir once or twice.
6. Add turmeric. Stir again.
7. Add tomatoes, vinegar, and 1/2 cup water.
8. Bring mixture to a boil.
9. Lower heat and simmer for 15 minutes.
10. Add okra, black pepper, and salt.
11. Cover and cook until okra is tender, about 20 minutes.
